sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 27:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 27:1
items.html: Because Partzuf SAG comes out on a screen of coarseness of phase two, which raises reflected light and clothes only up to Bina, whose name in the Rosh is Ozen. (Inner Light, Item 1)
